config.heading: Our Roots
config.content: Born from island culture and a love for the herb. We keep it real, we keep it irie, and we keep it moving. No corporate vibes — just real people, real bud, and real good times.

categories.title: Island Flower
categories.description: Hand-picked, sun-grown bud from the finest growers.

categories.title: Oils & Drops
categories.description: Smooth, full-spectrum oils for the mellow vibe.

categories.title: Edibles
categories.description: Tropical-infused treats that hit just right.

categories.title: Concentrates
categories.description: Pure power for the experienced herb lover.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Hit that 'Blaze Up' button, book a quick consultation, and you're golden. It's free and takes about 10 minutes.

items.question: Is this legal?
items.answer: 100% legit. We operate fully within cannabis regulations. All products prescribed by licensed healthcare professionals.

items.question: How fast is delivery?
items.answer: We move quick, mon. Most orders ship same-day and arrive within 1-3 business days. Tracking included.

items.question: What if I'm not feeling it?
items.answer: We make it right, every time. Reach out to our team and we'll sort you out. Good vibes guaranteed.

items.question: Can I choose my strain?
items.answer: For sure! Browse the full menu, or let our specialists recommend the perfect match for your vibe.
